description: A partial manuscript of the Latter Prophets, commissioned by Babshād b. David, a known qaraite dignitary in early 11th century Fusṭāṭ. His son David, also known from Geniza documents, is also mentioned, as well  as the qaraite Nasi Ṣemaḥ b. Asa b. Shaul.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
